prompt: A vast warehouse interior rendered in the style of a 17th-century scientific engraving, with endless rows of tall shelves extending into the distance, most shelves empty with only a few scattered crates placed far apart, a lone figure standing at the center overwhelmed by scale, intricate cross-hatching, fine linework, monochrome ink, precise linear perspective, no modern elements, no text
